# MuleSoft IBM CTG Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (3.0) of IBM CTG Connector documentation.
> See [IBM CTG Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ibm-ctg-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the IBM CTG Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [IBM CTG Connector 3.0 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ibm-ctg-connector/latest/ibm-ctg-connector-examples.md)
- [IBM CTG Connector 3.0 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ibm-ctg-connector/latest/ibm-ctg-connector-reference.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating IBM CTG Connector to Version 3.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ibm-ctg-connector/latest/ibm-ctg-connector-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [IBM CICS Transaction Gateway Connector 3.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/ibm-ctg-connector/latest/index.md)
